originalTitle: Why energy stocks still look so cheap, even after their big rally this month
summary: Energy stocks are having a big month as oil prices surge on Iran war fears — but it’s not solely the conflict in the Middle East that makes the sector appear attractive.
content: Energy stocks are having a big month as oil prices surge on Iran war fears — but it’s not solely the conflict in the Middle East that makes the sector appear attractive.
chineseTitle: 为什么能源股在本月大幅上涨后看起来仍然如此便宜
chineseSummary: 由于伊朗战争担忧导致油价飙升，能源股迎来了一个重要的月份——但让该行业显得有吸引力的不仅仅是中东冲突。
chineseContent: 由于伊朗战争担忧导致油价飙升，能源股迎来了一个重要的月份——但让该行业显得有吸引力的不仅仅是中东冲突。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
